bookTheme: Joy in Christ Despite All Circumstances

divisions.title: Joy in Christ
divisions.summary: Joy in suffering, living is Christ, humility of Christ, working out salvation with fear and trembling

divisions.title: Righteousness and Peace
divisions.summary: Righteousness through faith not law, pressing toward the prize, rejoice always, peace of God, final thanks

chapterSummaries.1: Paul's chains advance the gospel, to live is Christ, stand firm in one spirit
chapterSummaries.2: Humility of Christ, work out your salvation, Timothy and Epaphroditus
chapterSummaries.3: Beware of dogs, righteousness through faith, press toward the goal
chapterSummaries.4: Rejoice always, peace of God, think on these things, content in all circumstances
